mapper.select: select * from category_master cm1 WHERE cm1.parent_category_id != 0
select cm1.category_id, cm1.category_name from category_master cm1 WHERE cm1.category_id = #{category_id} AND cm1.parent_category_id != 0
SELECT cm1.category_id, cm1.category_name FROM category_master cm1 WHERE cm1.parent_category_id = 0
SELECT cm1.category_id, cm1.category_name FROM category_master cm1 WHERE cm1.category_id = #{category_id}
select cm1.category_id, cm1.category_name from category_master cm1 LEFT JOIN category_master cm2 ON cm1.parent_category_id = cm2.category_id where cm2.category_id = #{category_id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO category_master
category_name,
parent_category_id,
update_date
#{category_name},
#{parent_category_id},
now()
mapper.select: select count(pc.product_id) AS product_count from category_master cm1 LEFT JOIN category_master cm2 ON cm1.category_id = cm2.parent_category_id INNER JOIN product_category pc ON pc.category_id = cm2.category_id where cm2.category_id = #{category_id} OR cm1.category_id = #{category_id}
select cm2.category_id from category_master cm1 LEFT JOIN category_master cm2 ON cm1.category_id = cm2.parent_category_id where cm1.category_id = #{category_id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE category_master
category_name = #{category_name},
update_date = now()
WHERE category_id = #{category_id}
